mapper.sql: peai.group_id, peai.operation_code, peai.error_msg, peai.data_status, peai.employee_id, peai.employee_name, peai.work_card,peai.type, peai.award_name, peai.award_star_time, peai.award_end_time, peai.award_company, peai.award_content, peai.award_result, peai.award_money, peai.reference_backup_flag, peai.remarks, peai.id, peai.create_time, peai.create_by, peai.update_time, peai.update_by

${tAlias}.group_id as ${tAlias}_group_id, ${tAlias}.operation_code as ${tAlias}_operation_code, ${tAlias}.error_msg as ${tAlias}_error_msg, ${tAlias}.data_status as ${tAlias}_data_status, ${tAlias}.employee_id as ${tAlias}_employee_id, ${tAlias}.employee_name as ${tAlias}_work_card, ${tAlias}.work_card as ${tAlias}_work_card, ${tAlias}.type as ${tAlias}_type, ${tAlias}.award_name as ${tAlias}_award_name, ${tAlias}.award_star_time as ${tAlias}_award_star_time, ${tAlias}.award_end_time as ${tAlias}_award_end_time, ${tAlias}.award_company as ${tAlias}_award_company, ${tAlias}.award_content as ${tAlias}_award_content, ${tAlias}.award_result as ${tAlias}_award_result, ${tAlias}.award_money as ${tAlias}_award_money, ${tAlias}.reference_backup_flag as ${tAlias}_reference_backup_flag, ${tAlias}.remarks as ${tAlias}_remarks, ${tAlias}.id as ${tAlias}_id, ${tAlias}.create_time as ${tAlias}_create_time, ${tAlias}.create_by as ${tAlias}_create_by, ${tAlias}.update_time as ${tAlias}_update_time, ${tAlias}.update_by as ${tAlias}_update_by
mapper.insert: insert into pm_employee_award_interface (group_id, operation_code, error_msg, data_status, employee_id, peai.employee_id, employee_name, work_card, type, award_name, award_star_time, award_end_time, award_company, award_content, award_result, award_money, reference_backup_flag, remarks, create_time, create_by, update_time, update_by) values (#{groupId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{operationCode,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{errorMsg,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dataStatus,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{employeeId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{employee_name,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{work_card,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{type,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{awardName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{awardStarTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{awardEndTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{awardCompany,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{awardContent,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{awardResult,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{awardMoney,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{referenceBackupFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, #{remarks,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT})
mapper.update: update pm_employee_award_interface set group_id = #{groupId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, operation_code = #{operationCode,jdbcType=CHAR}, error_msg = #{errorMsg,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, data_status = #{dataStatus,jdbcType=CHAR}, employee_id = #{employeeId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, employee_name = #{employeeName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, work_card = #{workCard,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, type = #{type,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, award_name = #{awardName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, award_star_time = #{awardStarTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, award_end_time = #{awardEndTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, award_company = #{awardCompany,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, award_content = #{awardContent,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, award_result = #{awardResult,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, award_money = #{awardMoney,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, reference_backup_flag = #{referenceBackupFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, remarks = #{remarks,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_by = #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.insert:
insert into pm_employee_award_interface (group_id, employee_id,work_card,employee_name, operation_code, error_msg, data_status, type, award_name, award_star_time, award_end_time, award_company, award_content, award_result, award_money, reference_backup_flag, remarks, create_time, create_by, update_time, update_by) select #{groupId, jdbcType = BIGINT}, isnull((select pe.id from pm_employee pe where pe.enabled_flag = 1 and pe.name = #{employeeName, jdbcType = VARCHAR} and right(cast('000000'+rtrim(pe.work_card) as varchar),6) = right(cast('000000'+rtrim(#{workCard,jdbcType=VARCHAR}) as varchar),6)), -1),
right(cast('000000'+rtrim(#{workCard,jdbcType=VARCHAR}) as varchar),6), #{employeeName, jdbcType = VARCHAR}, 'C', case when isnull((select pe.id from pm_employee pe where pe.enabled_flag = 1 and pe.name = #{employeeName, jdbcType = VARCHAR} and right(cast('000000'+rtrim(pe.work_card) as varchar),6) = right(cast('000000'+rtrim(#{workCard,jdbcType=VARCHAR}) as varchar),6)), -1) = -1 then '人事中不存在该姓名、工号的员工' else '' end, case when isnull((select pe.id from pm_employee pe where pe.enabled_flag = 1 and pe.name = #{employeeName, jdbcType = VARCHAR} and right(cast('000000'+rtrim(pe.work_card) as varchar),6) = right(cast('000000'+rtrim(#{workCard,jdbcType=VARCHAR}) as varchar),6)), -1) = -1 then 'F' else 'T' end, #{type,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{awardName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{awardStarTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{awardEndTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{awardCompany,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{awardContent,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{awardResult,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{awardMoney,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{referenceBackupFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, #{remarks,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}
